menuData.title: Kahvaltı
menuData.subtitle: Gündüz 10:00 - 14:00 arası servis
menuData.subtitleEn: Breakfast service is available between 10:00 and 14:00.

items.name: Serpme Kahvaltı
items.description: 2 kişilik servis edilir. Ezine beyaz peynir, isli Çerkez peynir, kekikli sepet peynir, eski kaşar, ev yapımı reçeller, tereyağı, bal-kaymak, siyah ve yeşil zeytin, humus, domates-salatalık söğüş, yaprak sarma, patates kızartması, sigara böreği, sahanda dilediğiniz yumurta ve sınırsız çay ile.
items.descriptionEn: Served for two with Ezine white cheese, smoked Circassian cheese, herbed basket cheese, aged kashar, house jams, butter, honey and clotted cream, olives, hummus, fresh vegetables, stuffed vine leaves, fries, cheese rolls, eggs and unlimited tea.

items.name: Hafif Kahvaltı Tabağı
items.description: Ezine peynir, eski kaşar, siyah ve yeşil zeytin, söğüş, avokadolu poşe yumurta, 2 çeşit reçel ve 2 bardak çay veya 1 kahve.
items.descriptionEn: Ezine cheese, aged kashar, olives, fresh vegetables, poached egg with avocado, two jams and two teas or one coffee.

items.name: Avokadolu Dana Kaburga Füme Ekmek Üstü
items.description: Ekşi mayalı ekmek, avokado, pembe domates, dana kaburga füme, poşe yumurta ve Parmesan.
items.descriptionEn: Sourdough bread with avocado, pink tomato, smoked beef rib, poached egg and Parmesan.

items.name: Gorgonzola Dana Carpaccio Ekmek Üstü
items.description: Ekşi mayalı ekmek, gorgonzola peyniri, dana Carpaccio, avokado püresi ve roka.
items.descriptionEn: Sourdough bread with gorgonzola, beef carpaccio, avocado puree and arugula.

items.name: Manda Mozzarella Ekmek Üstü
items.description: Ekşi mayalı ekmek, manda mozzarella, pembe domates, kapari çiçeği ve ızgara istiridye mantarı.
items.descriptionEn: Sourdough bread with buffalo mozzarella, pink tomato, caperberry and grilled oyster mushrooms.

menuData.title: Zeytinyağlılar & Mezeler
menuData.subtitle: Diğer günlük mezeleri öğrenmek için servis personeline sorunuz.
menuData.subtitleEn: Please ask our service staff for other daily meze selections.

items.name: Fırınlanmış Domates Çorbası
items.description: Kaşar peyniri ve kruton ekmek ile.
items.descriptionEn: Roasted tomato soup with kashar cheese and croutons.

items.name: Brokoli Çorbası
items.description: Badem sütlü ve kavrulmuş badem ile.
items.descriptionEn: Broccoli soup with almond milk and roasted almonds.

items.name: Ayran Aşı Çorbası
items.description: Soğuk servis edilir.
items.descriptionEn: Served cold.

items.name: Hatay Usulü İçli Köfte
items.description: 2 adet.
items.descriptionEn: 2 pieces.

items.name: Sigara Böreği
items.description: 8 adet.
items.descriptionEn: 8 pieces.

items.name: Paçanga Böreği
items.description: Tek adet.
items.descriptionEn: Single piece.

items.name: Organica Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, manda mozzarella, dana bacon ve trüf yağı.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce, buffalo mozzarella, beef bacon and truffle oil.

items.name: Margherita Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, manda mozzarella, fesleğen sos ve zeytinyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce, buffalo mozzarella, basil sauce and olive oil.

items.name: Ham Mushroom Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, manda mozzarella, dana bacon, mantar ve zeytinyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce, buffalo mozzarella, beef bacon, mushrooms and olive oil.

items.name: Pizza Alfredo
items.description: Alfredo sos, tavuk, istiridye mantarı ve mozzarella peyniri.
items.descriptionEn: Alfredo sauce, chicken, oyster mushrooms and mozzarella.

items.name: Toniş Pizza
items.description: Ton balığı, rende mozzarella, kapari ve mor soğan.
items.descriptionEn: Tuna, grated mozzarella, capers and red onion.

items.name: Pepperoni Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, manda mozzarella ve pepperoni sucuk.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce, buffalo mozzarella and pepperoni.

items.name: Polpette Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, köfte topları, manda mozzarella, karamelize soğan, Jalapeño biber ve maydanoz.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce, meatballs, buffalo mozzarella, caramelized onions, jalapeño and parsley.

items.name: Carpaccio Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, manda mozzarella, pişmiş dana Carpaccio, Parmesan, zeytinyağı ve roka.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce, buffalo mozzarella, cooked beef carpaccio, Parmesan, olive oil and arugula.

items.name: 5 Peynirli Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, mozzarella, cheddar, gorgonzola, tulum ve Parmesan peyniri.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce with mozzarella, cheddar, gorgonzola, tulum and Parmesan cheeses.

items.name: Sebzeli Vejetaryen Pizza
items.description: Domates sos, patlıcan, kabak, kırmızı ve yeşil biber, mantar, siyah zeytin ve roka.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce with eggplant, zucchini, peppers, mushrooms, black olives and arugula.

items.name: Izgara Deniz Levreği
items.description: 300-350 gr fileto deniz levreği, kapari sos ve roka tulum salata.
items.descriptionEn: 300-350 g sea bass fillet served with caper sauce and arugula salad with aged tulum cheese.

items.name: Norveç Somon Izgara
items.description: 200 gr Norveç somon, karnabahar püresi, lor peynirli mevsim sebze ve portakal sos.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g Norwegian salmon with cauliflower puree, seasonal vegetables with curd cheese and orange sauce.

items.name: Cafe de Paris
items.description: 200 gr dana bonfile, Cafe de Paris sos, mevsim yeşillik ve trüf yağlı patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g beef tenderloin with Cafe de Paris sauce, seasonal greens and truffle fries.

items.name: Broil Soslu Dana Bonfile
items.description: 200 gr dana bonfile, havuç püresi, mevsim sebze ve broil sos eşliğinde.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g beef tenderloin with carrot puree, seasonal vegetables and broil sauce.

items.name: Dağ Kekikli Dana Antrikot
items.description: 200 gr dana antrikot, havuç püresi, mevsim sebze ve broil sos.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g beef ribeye with carrot puree, seasonal vegetables and broil sauce.

items.name: Dry Age Dana Pirzola
items.description: Dry age dinlendirilmiş dana pirzola, sebzeli risotto ve broil sos ile.
items.descriptionEn: Dry-aged veal chop served with vegetable risotto and broil sauce.

items.name: Organica Karabuğdaylı Tavuk Izgara
items.description: 200 gr tavuk ızgara, mor patates püresi, karabuğday patlakları, peri peri sos ve mevsim sebze.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g grilled chicken with purple potato puree, puffed buckwheat, peri-peri sauce and seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Organica Ali Nazik
items.description: Köz patlıcan yatağında dana bonfile.
items.descriptionEn: Beef tenderloin served on roasted eggplant puree.

items.name: Kuzu Şiş Lokum
items.description: 200 gr kuzu lokum, kremalı baby patates, tulum peynirli roka ve broil sos.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g lamb tender cubes with creamy baby potatoes, arugula with tulum cheese and broil sauce.

items.name: Hellim Köfte
items.description: 200 gr hellim peynirli köfte, kremalı baby patates ve mevsim yeşillik.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g halloumi cheese meatballs with creamy baby potatoes and seasonal greens.

items.name: Kasap Köfte
items.description: 200 gr köfte, köz patates püresi ve mevsim yeşillik.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g butcher-style meatballs with roasted potato puree and seasonal greens.

items.name: Vişne Kebabı
items.description: Yoğurt sos, ekmek ve vişne soslu köfte.
items.descriptionEn: Meatballs with yogurt sauce, bread and sour cherry sauce.

items.name: Izgara Bonfile Salata
items.description: 120 gr dana bonfile dilimleri, Akdeniz yeşillikleri, çeri domates, portakal sos, Parmesan peyniri, edamame, yaban mersini ve mevsim meyve.
items.descriptionEn: 120 g sliced beef tenderloin with Mediterranean greens, cherry tomato, orange dressing, Parmesan, edamame, blueberries and seasonal fruit.

items.name: Mozzarella Kuşkonmaz Salata
items.description: Manda mozzarella, ızgara kuşkonmaz, roka, domates, edamame ve mevsim meyve.
items.descriptionEn: Buffalo mozzarella with grilled asparagus, arugula, tomato, edamame and seasonal fruit.

items.name: Fit Tavuk Salata
items.description: 120 gr tavuk dilimleri, mevsim yeşillik, edamame, yaban mersini, ceviz, keten tohumu ve yoğurt sos.
items.descriptionEn: 120 g sliced chicken with seasonal greens, edamame, blueberries, walnuts, flaxseed and yogurt sauce.

items.name: Susamlı Norveç Somon Salata
items.description: Norveç somon dilimleri, mevsim sebzeleri, ananas, susam, pirinç sirkeli sos ve edamame.
items.descriptionEn: Norwegian salmon slices with seasonal vegetables, pineapple, sesame, rice vinegar dressing and edamame.

items.name: Avokado Esmer Pirinç Salatası
items.description: Esmer pirinç, avokado, mevsim yeşillik, tulum peyniri, domates, edamame ve yaban mersini.
items.descriptionEn: Brown rice with avocado, seasonal greens, tulum cheese, tomato, edamame and blueberries.

items.name: Hellim Izgara Sebze Salata
items.description: Akdeniz yeşillikleri, ızgara hellim peyniri, ızgara kabak ve patlıcan, domates, edamame ve mevsim meyve.
items.descriptionEn: Mediterranean greens with grilled halloumi, grilled zucchini and eggplant, tomato, edamame and seasonal fruit.

items.name: Karidesli Salata
items.description: Karides, Dijon hardallı roka, avokado, Parmesan peyniri, domates ve edamame.
items.descriptionEn: Shrimp with Dijon mustard arugula, avocado, Parmesan, tomato and edamame.

items.name: Çıtır Tavuk Salata
items.description: Akdeniz yeşillikleri, domates, edamame, soya filizi ve mevsim meyve.
items.descriptionEn: Mediterranean greens with tomato, edamame, soybean sprouts and seasonal fruit.

items.name: Sezar Salata
items.description: 120 gr ızgara tavuk dilimleri, Sezar sos, marul, Parmesan, kapari, kruton ekmek ve domates.
items.descriptionEn: 120 g grilled chicken slices with Caesar dressing, lettuce, Parmesan, capers, croutons and tomato.

items.name: Enginar Kalbi Salata
items.description: Roka, ızgara enginar, avokado, ızgara yeşil zeytin, ceviz ve domates.
items.descriptionEn: Arugula with grilled artichoke, avocado, grilled green olives, walnuts and tomato.

items.name: Keçi Peynirli Balkabaklı Risotto
items.description: Arborio pirinci, keçi peyniri, fırınlanmış bal kabağı, beyaz şarap ve taze biberiye.
items.descriptionEn: Arborio rice with goat cheese, roasted pumpkin, white wine and fresh rosemary.

items.name: Bonfile Risotto
items.description: Arborio pirinci, ızgara bonfile dilimleri, porcini mantarı, beyaz şarap ve Parmesan.
items.descriptionEn: Arborio rice with grilled beef tenderloin slices, porcini mushrooms, white wine and Parmesan.

items.name: Üç Mantarlı Risotto
items.description: Arborio pirinci, porcini mantarı, sarıkız mantarı, istiridye mantarı ve Parmesan peyniri.
items.descriptionEn: Arborio rice with porcini, chanterelle and oyster mushrooms, finished with Parmesan.

items.name: Deniz Mahsullü Risotto
items.description: Arborio pirinci, kalamar, karides, somon, beyaz şarap ve Parmesan.
items.descriptionEn: Arborio rice with calamari, shrimp, salmon, white wine and Parmesan.

items.name: Kuzu Kulağı Levrek Risotto
items.description: 200 gr deniz levrek, Arborio pirinci, beyaz şarap, kuzu kulağı püresi ve gorgonzola peyniri.
items.descriptionEn: 200 g sea bass with Arborio rice, white wine, sorrel puree and gorgonzola.

items.name: Fettuccine Alfredo
items.description: Dağ kekikli ızgara tavuk, krema, Parmesan, taze fesleğen ve tereyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Grilled chicken with thyme, cream, Parmesan, fresh basil and butter.

items.name: Deniz Mahsullü Linguine
items.description: Izgara karides, somon, kalamar, domates sos, Parmesan, fesleğen, koni domates ve tereyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Grilled shrimp, salmon and calamari with tomato sauce, Parmesan, basil, cherry tomato and butter.

items.name: Penne Siciliana
items.description: Domates sos, siyah zeytin, çeri domates, ızgara patlıcan, acı sos, taze fesleğen ve tereyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Tomato sauce with black olives, cherry tomato, grilled eggplant, spicy sauce, fresh basil and butter.

items.name: Spagetti Bolonez
items.description: Bolonez sos, domates sos, Parmesan ve tereyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Bolognese sauce with tomato sauce, Parmesan and butter.

items.name: Mantarlı Kremalı Tagliatelle
items.description: Porcini mantarı, sarıkız mantarı, krema, Parmesan ve tereyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Porcini and chanterelle mushrooms with cream, Parmesan and butter.

items.name: Siyah Mürekkepli Deniz Mahsullü Spagetti
items.description: Izgara karides, somon, kalamar, ızgara zeytin, domates sos, fesleğen ve tereyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Black ink spaghetti with grilled shrimp, salmon, calamari, grilled olives, tomato sauce, basil and butter.

items.name: Glutensiz Penne
items.description: Domates sos, siyah zeytin, patlıcan, fesleğen ve tereyağı.
items.descriptionEn: Gluten-free penne with tomato sauce, black olives, eggplant, basil and butter.

items.name: Kuzu Kulaklı Deniz Levrekli Tam Buğday Spagetti
items.description: Kuzu kulak sosu, gorgonzola peyniri ve tam buğdaylı spagetti.
items.descriptionEn: Whole wheat spaghetti with sorrel sauce, gorgonzola and sea bass.

items.name: Vegan Noodle
items.description: Mevsim sebzeleri, susam ve kaju.
items.descriptionEn: Seasonal vegetables with sesame and cashews.

items.name: Tavuklu Noodle
items.description: Mevsim sebzeleri, ızgara tavuk, susam ve kaju.
items.descriptionEn: Seasonal vegetables with grilled chicken, sesame and cashews.

items.name: Etli Noodle
items.description: Mevsim sebzeleri, ızgara bonfile dilimleri, susam ve kaju.
items.descriptionEn: Seasonal vegetables with grilled beef tenderloin slices, sesame and cashews.

items.name: Uzak Doğu Kaseleri
items.description: Haşlanmış sebzeler, kestane mantarı, istiridye mantarı, edamame, ıspanak, limon suyu, rice stick, soya filizi ve özel sos ile.
items.descriptionEn: Steamed vegetables with chestnut and oyster mushrooms, edamame, spinach, lemon juice, rice sticks, soybean sprouts and house sauce.

items.name: Vegan Kase
items.description: Kestane mantarı, istiridye mantarı, edamame, ıspanak, limon suyu, baby patates ve pesto sos ile.
items.descriptionEn: Chestnut and oyster mushrooms with edamame, spinach, lemon juice, baby potatoes and pesto sauce.

items.name: Soğuk Bowl
items.description: Basmati pirinç, avokado, tavuk, soya filizi, yoğurt sos ve mevsim sebze.
items.descriptionEn: Basmati rice with avocado, chicken, soybean sprouts, yogurt sauce and seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Esmer Pirinç Bowl
items.description: Esmer pirinç, Norveç somon, edamame, lahana turşusu ve yeşil mercimek.
items.descriptionEn: Brown rice with Norwegian salmon, edamame, pickled cabbage and green lentils.

items.name: Falafel Bowl
items.description: Falafel, pancar, Meksika fasulyesi, humus, kinoa ve göbek.
items.descriptionEn: Falafel with beetroot, Mexican beans, hummus, quinoa and lettuce.

items.name: Organica Burger
items.description: Hamburger köftesi, isli Boşnak kuru et, karamelize soğan, cheddar peyniri, turşu ve patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: Beef patty with smoked Bosnian cured beef, caramelized onions, cheddar, pickles and fries.

items.name: Cheese Burger
items.description: Hamburger köftesi, cheddar peyniri, turşu ve patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: Beef patty with cheddar, pickles and fries.

items.name: Trüfnica Burger
items.description: Hamburger köftesi, çıtır soğan, cheddar peyniri, trüflü mayonez, turşu, dana bacon ve patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: Beef patty with crispy onions, cheddar, truffle mayonnaise, pickles, beef bacon and fries.

items.name: Steak Burger
items.description: Dana bonfile, cheddar peyniri, dana bacon, karamelize soğan, turşu ve patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: Beef tenderloin with cheddar, beef bacon, caramelized onions, pickles and fries.

items.name: Dana Bacon Burger
items.description: Hamburger köftesi, dana füme bacon, karamelize soğan, cheddar peyniri, turşu ve patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: Beef patty with smoked beef bacon, caramelized onions, cheddar, pickles and fries.

items.name: Chicken Burger
items.description: Panelenmiş tavuk, karamelize soğan, turşu ve patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: Breaded chicken with caramelized onions, pickles and fries.

items.name: Vegan Burger
items.description: Panelenmiş avokado köftesi, karamelize soğan, turşu ve patates kızartması.
items.descriptionEn: Breaded avocado patty with caramelized onions, pickles and fries.

items.name: Steak Wrap
items.description: Jülyen doğranmış bonfile dilimleri, karamelize soğan, renkli biberler, cheddar peyniri, Akdeniz yeşillikleri ve patates kızartması ile.
items.descriptionEn: Julienned beef tenderloin with caramelized onions, peppers, cheddar, Mediterranean greens and fries.

items.name: Tavuk Wrap
items.description: Jülyen doğranmış tavuk dilimleri, karamelize soğan, renkli biberler, cheddar peyniri, Akdeniz yeşillikleri ve patates kızartması ile.
items.descriptionEn: Julienned chicken with caramelized onions, peppers, cheddar, Mediterranean greens and fries.

items.name: Mantarınca Wrap
items.description: Jülyen doğranmış bonfile dilimleri, porcini mantarı, kestane mantarı, karamelize soğan, renkli biberler, cheddar peyniri, Akdeniz yeşillikleri ve patates kızartması ile.
items.descriptionEn: Julienned beef tenderloin with porcini and chestnut mushrooms, caramelized onions, peppers, cheddar, Mediterranean greens and fries.

items.name: Tatlılarımız için servis personeline danışınız.
items.descriptionEn: Please ask our service staff for today's desserts.

items.name: Fuse Tea
items.description: Şeftali veya limon.
items.descriptionEn: Peach or lemon.

items.name: Özel Davet Menüleri
items.description: Toplu yemek, doğum günü ve özel davetler için kişiye özel menü oluşturulmaktadır.
items.descriptionEn: Tailored menus are available for group dining, birthdays and private events.

items.name: Ev Organizasyonları
items.description: Evlerinizde gerçekleştireceğiniz toplu organizasyonlar için bizden özel fiyat alabilirsiniz.
items.descriptionEn: You can contact us for special pricing for private group events at your home.
